creator: ohartman@mail.zedat.fu-berlin.de
text:
On 08/27/10 16:44, Martin Matuska wrote:
> I have tested lighttpd on a clean empty installation and there are no
> problems at all. The same was for older configurations.
>
> Did you switch switch to the new scheme properly?
>
> What about these lines in modules.conf:
>
> ## the default module set contains:
> ##
> ## "mod_indexfile", "mod_dirlisting", "mod_staticfile"

I switched properly from the old one to the more confusing one. Well, 
properly means I think I switched properly.

The default module set contains those modules in question - this is 
obviously about this line in module.conf, so I do not understand why it 
isn't loaded via dlopen.
